programme.title: Mike Hammer, Private Eye
programme.desc: Deputy Mayor Barry Lawrence may be running for District Attorney on a "law and order" platform, but that doesn't mean that his conduct is always above board. When his mistress Tracy calls, she puts him in a compromising position. The police investigation stalls in what appears to be an attempt to cover up for the man Tracy's parents believe killed her--Barry Lawrence. Mike loves the idea of getting dirt on Barry, but a brawl with a cop leaves him conducting his investigation--with the help of his team--from a jail cell.

programme.title: Mike Hammer, Private Eye
programme.desc: Radio host Dr. Silvia runs an on-air love and relationship advice show for women. When Mike Hammer's girlfriend takes Dr. Silvia's advice to dump him, he makes an unscheduled guest appearance in her studio in order to give her a piece of his mind. With his new reputation as a macho bully, Mike Hammer becomes the prime suspect after she is suddenly murdered. Now, he and his team must prove his innocence by finding the real killer.

programme.title: Mike Hammer, Private Eye
programme.desc: Mike Hammer travels down to Texas to attend his friend's wedding, but he still finds a case to work. Complications immediately arise when he discovers that the bride is missing. The fiancé's cousin is found dead with her organs surgically removed, and now the bride-to-be must be located before she might meet the same fate. Mike Hammer is the only one who can stop this white wedding from turning bloody.

programme.title: Football's Greatest Stage
programme.desc: The 1982 World Cup in Italy influences modern football through its political atmosphere, venue quality and tactical developments; the tournament remains a turning point for the sport.

programme.title: Football's Greatest Stage

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Younghoe Koo's 52-yard field goal as time expired in regulation forced overtime, and Cousins took care of the rest as he set a franchise record with 509 passing yards to lift Atlanta (3-2) into a tie atop the division.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Burrow throws 4 TD passes, Bengals rally past Steelers 37-30.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Watch the Arizona Cardinals' thrilling last-second win over the Buffalo Bills in Week 10 of the 2020 season. QB Kyler Murray completed a stunning 43-yard Hail Mary to WR DeAndre Hopkins in the game's waning moments to cement an improbable 32-30 victory.

programme.title: NFL Throwback
programme.desc: See which NFL superstars were shockingly traded at the peak of their careers.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Baltimore Ravens running back Derrick Henry rushed for a season-high 216 yards - the most ever by a visiting player at Lambeau Field - and matched a career high with 4 touchdown runs in the Ravens' 41-24 victory over the Green Bay Packers.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Chicago Bears rookie running back Kyle Monangai rushed for 130 yards and a touchdown, D'Andre Swift ran for 125 yards and a score, and Chicago finished with 281 yards on the ground to win its fifth straight game, 24-15 over the reeling Philadelphia Eagles on Black Friday.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Tom Brady and the Bucs beat Panthers 30-24, clinch the NFC South. Brady completed 34-of-45 passes for 432 yards and three touchdowns -- all three of which went to Mike Evans.

programme.title: Super Bowl Classic Games
programme.desc: The Seahawks dominated the trenches on both sides of the ball as their defense dropped Drake Maye for six sacks and their offense rushed for 141 total yards behind Kenneth Walker III's MVP performance in a 29-13 Seattle victory.

programme.title: NFL Throwback
programme.desc: Emmitt Smith on the Cardinals. Jerry Rice on the Seahawks. See which legendary players made stops at random destinations.

programme.title: NFL Throwback
programme.desc: The top 10 free-agent fails in NFL history.

programme.title: NFL Throwback
programme.desc: The top 10 free-agent signings in NFL history.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Brady threw for 368 yards and four touchdowns - two of them to his longtime favorite target Rob Gronkowski - and the Tampa Bay Buccaneers moved to the brink of clinching the NFC South title with a 30-17 victory over the Atlanta Falcons.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Jonathan Taylor makes history becoming the first player to score three touchdowns in three straight games against the same team as he carries the Colts behind another spectacular performance to a 38-14 victory over Cam Ward and the Titans.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Saquon Barkley has two rushing TDs, DeVito's 32-yard pass to Wan'Dale Robinson positioned Randy Bullock for a 37-yard field goal as time expired, securing a 24-22 victory for the Giants on Monday night.

programme.title: NFL Game of the Week
programme.desc: New York Jets running back Breece Hall rushed for 2 second-half touchdowns and threw a 4-yard touchdown pass to Mason Taylor with 1:54 left, helping Justin Fields and the Jets edge the Cincinnati Bengals 39-38 on Sunday for their first win.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Micah Parsons returns to Dallas for the first time as a member of the Green Bay Packers as they duel against the Dallas Cowboys in a back-and-forth brawl that goes into overtime and ends in a 40-40 tie game.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Burrow throws 4 TD passes, Bengals rally past Steelers 37-30.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Watch the Arizona Cardinals' thrilling last-second win over the Buffalo Bills in Week 10 of the 2020 season. QB Kyler Murray completed a stunning 43-yard Hail Mary to WR DeAndre Hopkins in the game's waning moments to cement an improbable 32-30 victory.

programme.desc: See which NFL superstars were shockingly traded at the peak of their careers.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Baltimore Ravens running back Derrick Henry rushed for a season-high 216 yards - the most ever by a visiting player at Lambeau Field - and matched a career high with 4 touchdown runs in the Ravens' 41-24 victory over the Green Bay Packers.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Chicago Bears rookie running back Kyle Monangai rushed for 130 yards and a touchdown, D'Andre Swift ran for 125 yards and a score, and Chicago finished with 281 yards on the ground to win its fifth straight game, 24-15 over the reeling Philadelphia Eagles on Black Friday.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Tom Brady and the Bucs beat Panthers 30-24, clinch the NFC South. Brady completed 34-of-45 passes for 432 yards and three touchdowns -- all three of which went to Mike Evans.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Saquon Barkley has two rushing TDs, DeVito's 32-yard pass to Wan'Dale Robinson positioned Randy Bullock for a 37-yard field goal as time expired, securing a 24-22 victory for the Giants on Monday night.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 7/13/15: Todd "The ToddFather" Frazier outlasts Prince Fielder, Josh Donaldson, and his last competitor, Joc Pederson, to snag the 2015 Home Run Derby crown with a total of 39 dingers throughout the competition.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 7/9/12: At the 2012 Home Run Derby, Prince Fielder takes down the likes of Jose Bautista, Carlos Beltran and Andrew McCutchen to win in Kansas City.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: In his 19th and final All-Star Game, Cal Ripken Jr. hits a home run to lead the American League to a 4-1 victory over the National League. The 2001 All-Star Game was also the final game for Padres right fielder Tony Gwynn.

programme.title: FastCast
programme.desc: FastCast brings you the top moments from around the league and features the Game of the Night.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: Cal Raleigh and Junior Caminero put on a show at the 2025 Home Run Derby.

programme.title: FastCast
programme.desc: FastCast brings you the top moments from around the league and features the Game of the Night.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: Despite Josh Hamilton's historic first round, Justin Morneau goes on to defeat Hamilton in the final to win the Home Run Derby at Yankee Stadium.

programme.title: FastCast
programme.desc: FastCast brings you the top moments from around the league and features the Game of the Night.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: The American League scores 13 runs in a victory over the National League in the 1992 All-Star Game

programme.title: MLB Game of the Week
programme.desc: Check out all of the action around the diamond as we take you to the best game from each week.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: In 2014, the Home Run Derby takes a new format. Yoenis Céspedes defends his title, hitting 30 homers to take home his second trophy.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: At the 2000 All-Star Game, Derek Jeter and Chipper Jones both go 3-for-3. The American League scores three insurance runs in the top of the 9th inning to secure their 6-3 victory over the National League.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: The 1986 All-Star Game resulted in an American League win that ended the National League's streak of winning the last 13 of 14 All-Star Games. Lou Whitaker and Frank White homered in the AL's 3-2 victory and Roger Clemens was named MVP.

programme.title: FastCast
programme.desc: FastCast brings you the top moments from around the league and features the Game of the Night.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 7/15/13: Yoenis Céspedes takes home the title in the 2013 Home Run Derby. He hit a total of 32 homers and takes out Bryce Harper in the final round.

programme.title: FastCast
programme.desc: FastCast brings you the top moments from around the league and features the Game of the Night.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: Watch the American League take on the National League in the 2025 All-Star Game.

programme.title: FastCast

programme.title: Great Games

programme.title: FastCast
programme.desc: FastCast brings you the top moments from around the league and features the Game of the Night.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: The 2008 MLB All-Star Game at Yankee Stadium was marked as the longest All-Star Game in history. It ended after 4 hours and 50 minutes in the 15th inning on a walk-of sacrifice fly from Michael Young.

Joey and Fury form a special bond and embark upon lifetime adventures at the Broken Wheel Ranch!

Colton, who suspects a larger conspiracy is at work, attempts to take Derringer in as a material witness, terms to which Yancy does not find himself obliged.

But his easygoing life is turned upside down when his unstable little brother, Tony (John Cassavetes), shows up with his bride-to-be, Joan (Julie London). While Steve has given up his gun-toting ways, Tony has not, and his violent tendencies lead to trouble for the entire town.

programme.desc: Ethan Allen and the Green Mountain Boys are at war with the ruthless tax collectors, a bunch of outlaws, more Robin Hood than the Dalton gang; when the authorities start to pin their misdeeds on them, Hawkeye must sort it out.

programme.desc: Someone is going to a lot of trouble to convince the townspeople that a witch has cursed them

programme.title: Humans VS. Everything
programme.desc: It’s all fun and games until the pranks begin. Humans are pitted against each other in this mischief showdown.

programme.title: Humans VS. Everything
programme.desc: Chaos Unleashed: Humans versus their fur-ever friends in a battle of wits and 'purr'-sonality clashes!

programme.title: Humans VS. Everything
programme.desc: Humans face their fears in a hilarious showdown. Luckily, laughter the best armor against unexpected twists!

programme.title: Humans VS. Everything
programme.desc: From gusty winds to fiery flames, get ready to watch humans face off against the unstoppable elements!

programme.title: World's Most Expensive Fails
programme.desc: These fails are FANTASTIC!

programme.title: World's Most Expensive Fails
programme.desc: You may fail only in your dreams...but we put it on TV!

programme.title: World's Most Expensive Fails
programme.desc: We've got vehicles crashing into lampposts, telephone poles, cables, and each other. Pretty pricy!

programme.title: World's Most Expensive Fails
programme.desc: Sometimes the most expensive things are the ones that don't break.

programme.title: Keep Your Distance Vol 5
programme.desc: Keep Your Distance is a stand-up comedy series, hosted by comedian Kevin KevOnStage Fredericks.

programme.title: Bill Engvall: Here's Your Sign It's Finally Time My Last Show
programme.desc: After spending over four decades delighting audiences, the renowned comedian takes the stage for the last time in his farewell stand-up special.

programme.title: Zarna Garg: One in a Billion
programme.desc: Zarna, an Indian-Immigrant mom, has plenty to joke about.

programme.title: Ty Barnett: Yep
programme.desc: The Chicago native who got his start at Seattle's Comedy Underground and who critics call “thought-provoking” and “edgy” performs to a live audience.

programme.title: Todd Barry: The Crowd Work Tour
programme.desc: Todd Barry brings no prepared jokes to this unconventional comedy tour. Instead, he relies on banter from the crowd to create laughs.

programme.title: Tim Allen: Men Are Pigs
programme.desc: In this special from 1990, Tim Allen proves men are pigs as he discusses family and the differences between women and men. In "Men are Pigs" , you see the groundwork for his successful show, "Home Improvement".

programme.title: Tim Allen: ReWires America
programme.desc: Tim Allen grunts, he burps, he soups up his lawnmower and he's damn proud of it! Filled with family bits as well as the stuff we've come to love him for: tools, engine and cars. In this 1991 special, we see the Tim Allen we grew to love.

programme.title: Leah Rudick: Spiraling
programme.desc: Comedian and viral social media sensation Leah Rudick delves into marriage, family psychics, and anxiety attacks in the Cracker Barrel.

programme.title: Maria Bamford: Local Act
programme.desc: Beloved comedian and best-selling author Maria Bamford reveals the joy and sense of community of being an LA comic in this intimate stand-up special.

programme.title: Maria Bamford: The Special Special Special
programme.desc: The comic performs for an audience consisting of only her parents.

programme.title: Mary Lynn Rajskub: Live From the Pandemic
programme.desc: Mary Lynn Rajskub takes the stage -- her garage, to try to make sense of her career and home life.

programme.title: Michael Ian Black: Very Famous
programme.desc: Michael Ian Black is very famous. Well, he’s not that famous, but he keeps telling the world he is. Filmed live in Philadelphia, Michael Ian Black’s sarcastic sense of humor comes to the stage in his latest comedy special.

programme.title: Michael Ian Black: Noted Expert
programme.desc: You know him from his hilarious work in sketch, TV, and film, but the comedian’s NYC special takes his deadpan delivery to a whole new level.

programme.title: Paul Rodriguez: The Here and Wow
programme.desc: Veteran comedian, Paul Rodriguez hits the stage to give his perspectives on life, from being peer pressured into believing in God to claiming to be the village idiot.

programme.title: Ryan Erwin: Full Time Quitter
programme.desc: Ryan Erwin looks at his inability in keeping a regular job; Erwin hilariously informs a sold-out Utah crowd why the job they're watching him do is the only one he's able to keep.

programme.title: Tj: January 3rd
programme.desc: After eight years performing in America, Haitian-born stand-up comedian Tanael Joachim debuts his first TV special. Recorded live in Brooklyn.

programme.title: Lavell Crawford: Home for the Holidays
programme.desc: The comic performs in St. Louis, discussing Christmas as a child, feeling guilty on Mother's Day, Thanksgiving and Disneyland.

programme.title: Lavell Crawford: I Could Eat - Part 1
programme.desc: Lavell Crawford is back and here to contemplate how "My 600 Pound Life" could go for 15 seasons and he was still underweight, the kind of racist you have to be to not take a free holiday, and explosive consequences in a Taco Bell bathroom.

programme.title: Lavell Crawford I Could Eat Part 2
programme.desc: Meat's on the menu with Lavell Crawford keeping Burger King humble to their have it your way slogan, godless vegetarians, and why the best chicken is from a house of God.

programme.title: Whitney Cummings: Money Shot
programme.desc: Comedy Central roast veteran Whitney Cummings gets the stage to herself in this debut special, which finds the young comedian riffing on a wide range of topics, chiefly the differences between men and women and how both behave in relationships.

programme.title: Jill-Michele Meleán: White/Latina
programme.desc: The half-Bolivian, half-Irish comic talks about navigating vastly different cultural identities while creating her own brand of funny.

programme.title: Richard Lewis: Magical Misery Tour
programme.desc: The comic proves to himself that he can still kill while performing sober in this nineties’ special, which features Lewis discussing his obsessions.

programme.title: Don Barnhart: The Spinal Disintegration of Man
programme.desc: Barnhart's stand-up show is a thrill ride of well-written, topical material exploring modern-day society in a hysterical and thought-provoking way.

programme.title: Zoltan Kaszas: Cat Jokes
programme.desc: Born in Budapest, Hungary and raised in San Diego, California, this comic first stepped onstage at the age of 19 and was hooked immediately.

programme.title: Brian Posehn: 25x2
programme.desc: The comedian discovers a renewed passion for a sci-fi franchise, discusses the loss of his heroes, and his hot takes on certain recording artists.

programme.title: Leanne Morgan: So Yummy
programme.desc: The stand up comic discusses dogs, cheerleading camp, the struggles of being an empty nester, and joining Weight Watchers for the 7th time.

programme.title: Jim Gaffigan: Noble Ape
programme.desc: The stand-up comedy star describes how his wife faced a medical crisis, and he attempted to hold down the fort for their five children.

programme.title: Travis Nelson: To Touch a Cloud
programme.desc: Magical lifeguard whistles, ice clouds and a skydiver’s bucket list come up for a comic who hasn’t recovered since Mother Nature’s growing stick.

programme.title: Tom Papa: Freaked Out
programme.desc: The famously upbeat comedian delivers a stand-up performance that includes his observations on the perils of raising daughters and much more.

programme.title: Tom Papa: Human Mule
programme.desc: The everyman comic returns with his third hour-long stand-up special with a positive take on fighting for survival in an increasingly chaotic world.

programme.title: Aries Spears: Comedy Blueprint
programme.desc: The MADTV alum takes the stage in Philadelphia to deliver jokes and impressions, where no one is spared from his ferociously aggressive comic style.

programme.title: Billy Gardell: Halftime
programme.desc: The star of TV’s “Mike and Molly” returns to where the funny began for him, his hometown, Pittsburgh, in a live show saluting working-class America.

programme.title: Brian Posehn: The Fartist
programme.desc: Quirky comedian and actor Brian Posehn shares his stories of trying to be a better person in this stand-up set filmed live at Seattle's Neptune Theater.

programme.title: Brian Posehn: Criminally Posehn
programme.desc: Brian Posehn brings his signature style to San Diego Comic-Con, rocking the House of Blues with hilarious stand-up and some over-the-top surprises.

programme.title: Dominique Witten: Stop Me When I'm Lying!
programme.desc: The stand up comic, actress, and “Chappelle's Show" performer gives her signature hot takes regarding the life and times of a modern comedian.

programme.title: Eddie Griffin: Undeniable
programme.desc: Eddie Griffin brings his blunt and undeniable style to this stand-up set about athletes and racial stereotypes, relationships, and human mistakes.

programme.title: Eddie Griffin: You Can Tell 'Em I Said It
programme.desc: The excitable comic again proves why he is one of the world’s premiere funnymen, ripping into racial stereotypes, Viagra, the First Lady, and more.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham: Unhinged in Hollywood
programme.desc: Previously unseen stand-up comedy by Jeff Dunham; sketches that include popular characters; Brad Paisley performs; special appearances by comic Chris Parnell and former UFC champion Chuck Liddell.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham: Spark of Insanity
programme.desc: Jeff and his felt friends Walter, Melvin the Superhero Guy, Peanut, and others share their latest and greatest thoughts about our times.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham: Minding the Monsters
programme.desc: The comedian and ventriloquist extraordinaire, along with this felt friends, visits a haunted house where hilarious chaos ensues.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham: I'm With Cupid
programme.desc: Ventriloquist and stand-up comedian Jeff Dunham performs an all-Valentine's Day-themed special.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Burt Reynolds rocks a polyester suit and Buddy Hackett’s orgasm sneeze makes for really compelling TV.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: In his first appearance on the show, Jim Carrey impersonates Elvis, Jack Nicholson, E. T. and the Muppets.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Richard Pryor discusses his latest film, "Superman," and seeing Ronald Reagan. Then Ally Sheedy stops by.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Jerry Seinfeld skewers Rambo flicks. Arnold Schwarzenegger plays a Russian cop and learns the language!

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Skiing tips from Buddy Hackett, fan mail tips from Cindy Williams and TV journalism tips from Sander Vanocur.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Oscar winner and activist Susan Sarandon recalls her first communion.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Stars of two of the televisions biggest shows join Johnny--Ted Danson (Cheers) and Courtney Cox (Friends).

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Jack Paar wanted to buy a Rolls Royce for his mother for just $5. Johnny reads kids' letters to Santa Claus.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Bette Davis comments on her Kennedy Center award and President Reagan.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Alan Thicke discusses early days in a band on a cruise ship. Also funny riff on sex seminar with Dr. Ruth.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: The Mighty Carson Art Players do an "Hourly News" sketch with Buddy Hackett, Dave Thomas and Teresa Ganzel.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: TV actor Emmanuel Lewis admits he watches The Tonight Show “only once in a blue moon.”

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Small screen icon Farrah Fawcett discusses her new TV movie, and Ryan O'Neal is obsessed with her.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Hear what Joan Rivers has to say about retouched magazine covers, Gone With The Wind and Dolly Parton.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Carlin doesn't feel great, but he looks great! Mark Harmon is a big Carlin fan, and Johnny feels left out.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Leo Durocher talks retirement, Don Rickles accidentally bumps Ed but gives him a kiss to make up for it, Olga Fikotová arm wrestles Johnny and gives a stretching lesson.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Garry Shandling does a standup routine and inventor Joe Newman talks with Johnny.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Is the cost of a night at the movies getting you down? Jerry Seinfeld’s got a hilarious rant.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Oscar nom’d George Segal demonstrates playing an old man using prosthetics, glasses and gait.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Only on The Tonight Show will you see Patrick Swayze talking about a song he wrote called "Sweet June Farts."

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Luke Skywalker, a.k.a. Mark Hamill, chats about the making of the iconic movie Star Wars.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone reflects on being recognizable worldwide and issues in his private life.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: James Garner on bypass surgery, 9,000 get-well cards. The operation has not, thankfully, hurt his golf game.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Tony Randall joins the panel panel and he's joined by Lara Flynn Boyle, who discusses "Twin Peaks."

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Learn how to raise rabbits on a fire escape with Buddy Hackett and how to light a fire with Brady Watt.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Star Trek’s Dr. Spock -- Leonard Nimoy – presents Johnny with a pair of Vulcan ears.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Comedy genius and Carol Burnett co-star Tim Conway discuss his movie, "Long Shot," marriage, and horseracing.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Buddy Hackett has knowledge on many subjects, including snakes. Plus Dr. Morris Goldberg talks chauffeuring.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Actor/Comedian Eddie Murphy shows an SNL clip in which he impersonates Bill Cosby.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Susan Sarandon, Brooke Shields and Carol Wayne all stop by the couch, and Johnny talks about Playboy.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Columbo Star Peter Falk discusses the series’ ties to the Mensa Society.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Flip Wilson does stand-up, Pat Boone talks about the Olympics and a doctor waxes poetic on spanking children.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Mel Brooks talks about Young Frankenstein and Blazing Saddles. Plus, Susan Blakely and Bob Rosefsky appear.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: James Woods talks body casts, Peter Billingsley plans to quit acting when he turns 18 + Martin Mull appears.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Cloris Leachman reveals her favorite prize --mother of the year -- awarded by a club in New York.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: The legendary Joan Rivers talks giving birth and politics, but not necessarily at the same time.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Dana Carvey stops by and does impressions. Plus, Christopher Reeve talks Superman and Frank Olivier juggles.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Stand Up comedian Tim Thomerson announces he’s leaving comedy to act in grade B sci-fi movies.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Full House dad Bob Saget explains his attempts at trying to improve his appearance.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Paul Reiser talks about getting a sensitive body part stuck in an exercise machine.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: After a monologue touching on gas prices, Johnny welcomes MASH's McLean Stevenson. George Carlin makes his 2nd Tonight Show appearance and Gene Hackman promotes The Conversation.

programme.desc: John Larroquette discusses hair loss, playing the saxophone and...The Weasel Awards. Don't ask!

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: At Halloween, Jackie learns a shocking secret while trying to reopen the Lunch Box.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Jackie and Becky pitch their business plan to Darlene in hopes of getting the Lunch Box back, but Darlene's decision leads to hostility among the three.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Thanksgiving chaos erupts as Dan gathers the family; tensions rise over the Lunch Box; Harris surprises everyone with a bold move.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Jackie’s faced with a tough decision that brings the family and community together.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Dan is disappointed when everyone but Becky forgets about his birthday; Darlene faces another issue; Dan excludes Jackie from the family Christmas Santa photo for mistreating Louis

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: The Conners resist Becky's Packers fan boyfriend; Dan emphasizes family loyalty to the Bears to Mark; Ben and Darlene seek a loan for their magazine.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Darlene’s thrilled when Harris gets into Central Illinois State, but she may have other plans.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: The Conners debate voting reasons; Louise's offer threatens to take her from Lanford, prompting family intervention in Dan's relationship.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Dan avoids grief until it confronts him; Ben and Darlene tackle baby fever; Dwight's nervous to fill in for an injured chef.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Dan connects with his half-brother but struggles with their father's unequal treatment; Jackie hits it off with a fun married couple.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Darlene joins Price Warehouse for income; Jackie advances her relationship with Ron and Janelle; Ben alters his appearance for advertisers.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Harris returns home newly-unemployed; Becky seeks childcare; Jackie advises reaching out to Emilio's family; the family ponders tattoos.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Bev returns, wants to spread happiness with her money. She offers to fund Mark's coding camp tuition, but Darlene suggests giving it to Harris.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Dan’s ready to share his feelings with Louise; Darlene realizes how badly she wants a baby.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Dan and Louise deepen their bond amid the challenges of aging; Darlene's night in jail leaves Ben in charge of parenting; Mark's class experiment with a friend results in hickeys.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Darlene and Ben hunt for apartments; Jackie, Becky, and Beverly Rose road trip to Mexico to meet her father; Dan confides financial woes to Louise.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: The Conners are dealing with the pandemic and life's financial troubles; the Lunch Box is closed for everything but takeout and delivery.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Mary is devastated that Halloween has been canceled by the city, so Darlene and Becky enlist Jackie and the rest of the family to create an unforgettable experience.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Darlene isolates herself from her co-workers at Wellman Plastics, leaving them with the impression she is an elitist snob.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: It's Beverly Rose's first birthday -- but it's not all cake and candles -- when Becky and Emilio disagree on what kind of party they should have.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Darlene's friendship with a manager at Wellman Plastics lands her in an awkward situation; Louise's brother tries to win over Jackie.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Harris's job is in jeopardy after joining a protest she strongly believes in, leading to tense discussions within the family.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Ben's mom arrives after an unexpected death and unveils shocking information from the past; Becky and Emilio spend more time together.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Harris brings home her new friend, Josh, leaving the family questioning his intentions; Becky and Ben's attempt to build a closet stirs up family drama.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Darlene earns a promotion at Wellman Plastics, while Ben decides on a new career path; Jackie tries an herbal tea. and it leads to an emotional revelation.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Chuck's new purchase of a boat creates a rift; Darlene hires her first assistant at Wellman's Plastics but soon realizes she is anything but helpful.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Darlene starts to feel the pressures of her new job; Dan attempts to help Ben out at the hardware store, but the two don't always agree on how to run the business.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Mark is convinced he has COVID-19; Becky and Harris team up to confront Josh, who has been 'ghosting' Harris.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Dan feels helpless when Louise refuses to let him put himself at risk for her; when Jackie learns the competing restaurants are posting negative reviews.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Becky meets up with an old friend and feels pressured to impress him; Dan questions his position at the hardware store, leading to a massive fight between him and Ben.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Becky is working double shifts and taking classes at the community college, resulting in less time with her daughter; Dan decides to foster an elderly dog.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Darlene learns shocking news about a friend; the Conners family comes together to help someone close to them.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Dan encounters a surprise visitor who shares some unsolicited advice, leaving him feeling guilty; Darlene welcomes a new employee to Wellman Plastics.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Mark is stressed and exhausted from studying for an important entrance exam, so Darlene steps in to help, but her plan backfires.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Darlene makes a decision about her trip to Hawaii, leading to a heated encounter with Barb; Becky gives a presentation on addiction to Mark's class.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Two proposals bring big changes to the Conner family; Jackie uses her Jeopardy infamy to her advantage.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: The Conners continue to deal with the pandemic while navigating breakups and newfound sobriety, all while planning an upcoming wedding.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: After Ben declines Darlene's proposal, she starts to ponder why she tends to be so negative in life, prompting her to start a journey of self-discovery, which leads to Pastor Phil.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Part of Becky's recovery program mandates she make amends with people she has lied to over the years, leading her to meet up again with a former high school friend.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: It's Dan and Louise's wedding day, but it's a far-from-perfect, especially when a weather report forecasts that a tornado is headed for Lanford creating chaos and surprises.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: The Conners are ready for Halloween, despite a leaky roof that forces Dan and Louise to cancel their honeymoon

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Darlene worries about Mark making friends at his new school; Mark turns to Ben for advice; Becky finds herself thriving in college and starts thinking about her future plans.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Jackie devises an offbeat plan to serve the customers at The Lunch Box, it's anything but smooth; Dan begins to sell furniture to make room for his new bride and her things.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: As Louise starts to move in, Dan decides to sell the furniture he bought for Roseanne when they were married; he soon finds parting with the furniture harder than he thought.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Darlene brings Nick to the hardware store, where they run into Ben, who invites Nick to join him at The Lunch Box to watch a Bears game.

programme.title: The Conners

programme.desc: Rappers Snoop Doog and Wiz Khalifa team up to create this ultimate stoner comedy about high school.

programme.title: Mike Epps Presents: Live from Club Nokia
programme.desc: The jokes are funnier than ever in this hilarious new comedy special that showcases Epps, in addition to a variety of talented comedians.

programme.title: Janky Promoters
programme.desc: Two shady concert promoters get into hot water when their chance to book a superstar rapper goes awry.

programme.title: School Dance
programme.desc: A teen hopes to impress a girl he likes by winning a spot on his school's hottest dance crew.

programme.title: What She Wants for Christmas
programme.desc: When a little girl writes to Santa to fulfill a secret wish she’s been keeping from her mom, St. Nick disappoints her, so she decides to capture him.

programme.title: The Christmas Planner
programme.desc: Ava falls for a single dad while decorating his home, but his ex’s return tests her faith in Christmas magic.

programme.title: A Wonderful Christmas
programme.desc: To help her family, Josie takes it upon herself to make sure her family is able to have a wonderful Christmas.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: A couple of slackers stumble across a cult of monsters at a carnival and becomes a killing zombie.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: "War of the Colossal Beast" (1958) Cult. Man-beast escapes in "Amazing Colossal Man" sequel.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: A mad scientist creates havock when an experiment to stop the aging process goes awry.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: "Jungle Goddess" (1948) Action. Two fortune hunters find a lost heiress running a tribe in Africa. With George Reeves, Wanda McKay, Ralph Byrd.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: "Rocketship X-M" (1950) Science fiction. Four men and a woman shoot for the moon and land on Mars, which is occupied and tinted red. With Lloyd Bridges, Osa Massen, Hugh O'Brian.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: "The Girl in Gold Boots" (1968) Crime drama; A draft dodger works as a janitor in Hollywood while his girlfriend goes into go-go dancing.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: "The Touch of Satan" (1968) Horror. A farm girl is a 127-year-old witch.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: “B” movie seems too generous a term for this one — is there such a thing as a “Z” movie? Rondo Hatton plays a disfigured man, a/k/a “The Creeper,” who hunts down and kills the people responsible for his deformity.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: "I Accuse My Parents" (1945) Drama. Judge cites parental neglect in case of teen up for murder.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: Counterintelligence takes on a new meaning in this barely coherent tale of Hawaiian espionage that takes place on movie sets meant to look like Hawaii.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: "City Limits" (1985) Science fiction. Two gangs of teenage bikers rule a divided city with jousts in a post-plague future of no adults.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Miami Connection
programme.desc: The RiffTrax crew takes on this 1987 action farce about a Taekwondo-loving metal band and their battle with biker ninjas running Miami’s drug trade.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: A bizarre ocean creature spreads panic throughout Florida after a botched scientific experiment in "Devilfish.".

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: Secret Agent Bart Fargo chases the kidnappers of the inventor of a death ray. Tom makes his own death ray for peaceful use but caves in to the pressure to use it on Crow.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Icebreaker
programme.desc: The RiffTrax crew hits the slopes for this Die Hard on Skis with Sean Astin, a delightfully hammy Bruce Campbell and terrorists with a stolen nuke.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: "Being From Another Planet."

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: "The Creeping Terror" (1964) Horror. A slow hairy monster from outer space absorbs people in Lake Tahoe, Nev. With Vic Savage, Shannon O'Neill.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: "Werewolf" (1996) Horror. Members of an isolated desert community become beasts when the moon is full.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: A Russian hero plots an invasion against the Mongols in The Sword and the Dragon (1956). Mike and the Bots create their own topical comedy show, reenact the table cloth scene from the movie, and try their hand at playing Dungeons and Dragons.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: A hit-and-run victim is brought back from the dead by a voodoo doctor, and then seeks revenge.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: In Indestructible Man, a violent criminal named Butcher Benson is executed and becomes indestructible when he’s brought back to life . Butcher seeks revenge against those who caused his execution.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: A botched experiment hurls scientists into a bleak future full of mutants, androids and catty humans.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Dr. G must decide if she can perform a successful autopsy without the deceased's organs. As she ponders the decision, we are given a rare glimpse into a different side of Dr. G's job.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: As each lead turns cold in a gruesome murder case, Dr. G worries justice may never be served. As the autopsy draws to a end, Dr. G uncovers a shocking clue that may solve this crime.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A daughter wants to surprise her dad with breakfast in bed but finds him unresponsive. His family is convinced they know what killed him, but Dr. G must let the evidence speak for itself.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A teacher excuses himself for a nap after dinner, but he never wakes up. The man has a complex medical history that leads Dr. G on a hunt for an explanation to his mysterious death.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A woman fears the worst when her aunt stops answering her calls. When her greatest fear is confirmed, Dr. G must determine one thing: was this a fatal fall?

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A woman is killed in a drunk driving accident. At first, her death seems to be an open-and-shut case, but Dr. G discovers clues that the woman may have played a key role in her own death.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A mother of infant twins notices that her son is not breathing. EMTs attempt to revive him, but it's too late. Now, Dr. G must work fast to determine if the other twin's life is in danger.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A florist meets with clients for an upcoming wedding, but she suddenly collapses to the floor. With no apparent cause of death, Dr. G worries that this case may go unsolved.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: When an infant dies under mysterious circumstances, the young parents are prime suspects. Dr. G discovers several clues that bolster the child abuse theory, but the case is not clear cut.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Police make a grisly discovery: a woman's battered and dead body. With little evidence and no witnesses, Dr. G must identify the body and determine the cause of death to catch her killer.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A neighbor hears odd sounds coming from the next apartment. When police arrive, they find a man bruised and dead. When all signs point to foul play, it's up to Dr. G to find proof of murder.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: It's up to Dr. G to determine if alcohol was to blame in a man's death or if there was a silent killer lurking in his body.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Parents rush their baby to the hospital, but she tragically dies in her mother's arms. Now, Dr. G must help these devastated parents understand what happened.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A train engineer panics when he spots a man lying on the tracks. He blows the whistle, but the train can't stop in time. It's up to Dr. G to piece together how Andy Santana died.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: It's up to Dr. G, along with the National Transportation Safety Board, to piece together how and why a plane crashed, leaving the pilot dead.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Reed Baley is found unconscious the morning after his bachelor party. Now, it's up to Dr. G to determine if alcohol was to blame or if there was another cause of death.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Authorities respond to a fire, only to find Carolyn Casey's body at the center of the blaze. With little evidence and no witnesses, Dr. G must find the cause of death to catch her killer.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Leo Guzman falls off a ladder while painting a house. At first, his death seems to be an open-and-shut case but, as the autopsy unfolds, Dr. G believes there may be more to this case.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A teen is eating breakfast when his dad starts stabbing himself. As the investigation unfolds, police begin to doubt the story. Dr. G must determine if this was a suicide or a murder.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: When Marie Allen visits her sister, she makes a gruesome discovery: the 49-year-old is dead on the couch. Now, it's up to Dr. G to figure out if this was an accident or something sinister.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Dr. Farley discusses the bizarre case of a pregnant mother who suddenly dies. As the autopsy unfolds, Dr. Farley uncovers information that could have saved her and her unborn child's life.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Roy Cambells is found dead and covered with scratches, his aggressive 80lb dog by his side. Dr. G wonders if the dog could have been responsible for the man's death.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Dario Romano is found dead by his son at the bottom of the attic ladder. What happened to this 45-year-old? With Dr. G's guidance, Dr. Stephany must solve the mystery.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Keith Douglas is met with a barrage of bullets as he opens his door. The police are looking to Dr. G for hard evidence to link certain suspects to the murder.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: 69-year-old widower, Ernesto Vasquez is found dead on his porch with a loaded gun, a knife and three empty pill bottles.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: 45-year-old Natalie, who's visiting her sister from Australia, is found dead the morning after a heated argument with her estranged brother-in-law. Dr. G suspects foul play and she must race against the clock to give the police and Natalie's family the answers they need.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: After suffering an apparent seizure, 37-year-old Ruben Delgado is found lifeless by his girlfriend.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: 58-year-old Leroy Williams is rushed to the ER by his wife after becoming disorientated. Doctors work tirelessly, but Leroy slips into a coma and eventually dies.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: In a bizarre scene, 44-year-old Olga Petrova is found severely burnt in her home after a heated argument with her fiancé. Police want to question him and find out what happened, but he's nowhere to be found.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: An 82-year-old woman appears to have committed suicide by overdosing on painkillers, but Dr. G finds evidence that suggests that she may have died of a heart attack.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Dr. G preforms an autopsy on an alleged hit-and-run victim but finds no evidence of vehicular injury on the 41-year-old man's body. Could his alcoholism have had a role in his death?

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: In August of 1995, when Dr. G worked in Texas, a pile of human bones was found at a supposedly haunted railroad crossing. Dr. G was able to determine the age but not the sex.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A 94-year-old woman dies in the hospital after having a convulsion. The case becomes the business of the medical examiner's office when no one will sign her death certificate.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: An infant and his two-year-old sister are found dead in a house shared by two families. At first, they are believed to have died from either carbon monoxide poisoning or cold medicine overdoses.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A decomposing body is found in a pond and a tent is found nearby. Dr. G performs the autopsy in the morgue but finds few clues other than fingerprints and mouthwash in the stomach.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Police patrolling the night streets hear gunshots and head to the scene. They find a nude middle-aged man in parking lot lying face down in a puddle of blood.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: While in the process of adopting a five-week-old baby, a mother takes him to work with her. While there, the baby inexplicably obtains a skull fracture while unsupervised.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: On a Texas highway, a fire is discovered having burnt three bodies beyond recognition. Dr. G finds bullets in the bodies and determines that they were all shot before being set on fire.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: An employee is found dead in a restaurant kitchen. Clues found near the body include an empty cash register, a knife and a trail of blood splotches leading to a vandalized car in the parking lot.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A healthy 53-year-old woman is found dead in bed. After performing an autopsy and taking blood and tissue samples, Dr. G cannot find the cause of death.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A man is found dead in a motel room due to multiple shotgun wounds. Dr. G proves the scene isn't what it seems.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Rusty Updike has asked his ex-wife Vesta on a cruise. The couple haven't seen each other for 15 years but Vesta decides that a cruise with her ex might make for a nice change of pace.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Melissa Riobe's life is ruled by her addiction to drugs. Now, the 42-year-old woman has learned how to buy powerful prescription drugs online without a doctor's note.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Recent college grad Robert Terrible is out drinking at a club with friends celebrating. At 3am, he realizes he better call it a night and heads to the nearby garage where he parked his car.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: It's an early Sunday morning when a local resident decides to take a short-cut through the church parking lot. Walking past a lone car, the resident can't believe his eyes.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: It is 3am and Deputy Torres is cruising a Texas highway when he suddenly spots a crushed pick-up truck along the side of the road. Trapped inside is the lifeless body of 24-year-old Luis Reyes.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Carol Moleskie agrees to go on a hunting excursion with her husband, Bob. A few hours after they enter the woods, they emerge again, Bob frantically waving down traffic as he carries his bloody wife.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: It's a late night and a Vietnam veteran with a history of mental illness is drunk and stumbling through an apartment complex. When the police arrive, he pulls a gun and shoots himself in the head.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Jeffrey Ortiz, a mentally challenged man with the mental capacity of a nine-year-old, is making himself a sandwich when he inexplicably falls, striking his head on the kitchen counter.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: When the husband, Tao Chen, is shot to death by his wife Jun, she claims she pulled the trigger in self-defense when a drunken Tao came after her with a gun.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A young boy is attacked by a shark and comes close to death as surgeons battle to save his life.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A pregnant woman has a cerebral aneurysm, a man is stabbed in the heart and more.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A doctor with a severe bee allergy is stung while treating a critical patient who's been stabbed in the eye; a man comes into the ER after slitting his own throat; a paramedic becomes a patient when she's struck by a mysterious illness.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A bridesmaid drinks herself into a dangerous coma; a man's eyeball pops out of his head; a premature infant is abandoned in the ER.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A teenage girl is impaled through the neck on an iron fence; a patient is convinced he's turning into a vampire; a first-year attending physician stands up to a room full of senior specialists to save the life of a critically ill pregnant woman.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: Two seemingly unrelated gunshot wounds lead to a bizarre night in the ER.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A man comes into the ER thinking he's constipated but his condition is life-threatening.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A circus sword-swallower suffers from a persistent case of hiccups; a mother and daughter mysteriously collapse in the ER; a woman loses control of her legs at her daughter's graduation.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A patient appears to be hallucinating and sends the ER staff on a wild-goose chase around the hospital.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Secrets
programme.desc: An embarrassing secret prohibits a heart attack patient from being rushed to the ER.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: Doctors must decide whether to put a hole in a teenager's head or wait for more help.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A woman's pregnancy veers toward tragedy as eclampsia threatens both her life and that of her child.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A car with teen girls crashes into a fence, with a pole shooting through the windshield and into the driver.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A young woman is rushed to the ER after being bitten on the face by a dog.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A pregnant woman's leg pain turns out to be flesh-eating virus, threatening life and limb; a Desert Storm war veteran swallows razor blades on a dare; a bride-to-be spends her wedding day in the ER after collapsing at the altar.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: Three patients sneak their pets into the hospital, causing pandemonium in the ER.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: An unresponsive golfer needs immediate surgery, three near-naked adults wreak havoc in the ER and more.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: Doctors struggle to save a young man brought to the ER frozen and pulseless.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A man arrives in the ER with blue skin, doctors struggle to save a plane crash survivor and more.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A man is rushed to the ER with a 16-inch bar protruding from his neck.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A pregnant woman is shot in the abdomen, a doctor is the victim of a car burglary and more.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: An unconscious woman is bleeding internally. A man with a 4-day erection needs extraordinary help.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: An entire fraternity is plagued with blue urine, a pregnant woman is bitten by a spider and more.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A bridesmaid drinks herself into a dangerous coma; a man's eyeball pops out of his head; a premature infant is abandoned in the ER.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A man goes into anaphylactic shock, a tough guy fears needles and a man stabs himself with a ninja sword.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A man is impaled in the abdomen by a stiletto heel. A seemingly healthy outdoorsman has a series of seizures.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Temptations
programme.desc: A man comes into the ER with a surprising body part stuck inside a camping stove.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: Doctors must decide whether to put a hole in a teenager's head or wait for more help.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A violent patient faking a coma holds doctors and police hostage after stealing a policeman's gun.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A man dressed as Santa is near death and his wife asks to harvest his semen.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A Halloween zombie with a problem below the belt mystifies doctors.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: An off-duty ER physician diagnoses his own critical illness while en route to the hospital.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A live boa constrictor wrapped around a man's arm is biting his wrist and won't let go.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A teen's bulging tummy shocks nurses and doctors, a college co-ed mysteriously stops breathing and more.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: An entire fraternity is plagued with blue urine, a pregnant woman is bitten by a spider and more.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A man crashes his car into a cow. A woman has a stiletto heel jammed into her cheek.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Nursing Intuition
programme.desc: A stroke patient's heart mysteriously stops, starts again and then stops.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A man itching from poison oak exposure turns out to also have maggots burrowing into an injury on his back.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: Doctors are baffled when a retired admiral is growing weaker by the day.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A pregnant woman is shot in the abdomen, a doctor is the victim of a car burglary and more.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: An urgent care physician must invent creative ways to save a choking child.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A mugging victim arrives with two bullet wounds to the brain.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: Doctors perform a chest incision while awaiting surgeons. An iguana is brought in following a car accident.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: The hospital is locked down when a nurse is shot in the ER. A bride is rushed in from her wedding.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A young boy at a sleepover party mysteriously loses control of his arms and legs.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: An ER doctor's friend arrives at the hospital combative and out of control, attacking the doctor in the ER.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: This special episodes features ten of the craziest stories from the first 100 episodes.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A man has a sword impaled in his head in a roleplaying battle, a patient is terrified of germs and more.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: The force of a tornado drove a fence picket through Julie's neck.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A paralyzed stroke patient watches in horror as his wife and his two girlfriends fight over him.

programme.title: Wipeout Australia
programme.desc: From singing Pastors to Wookies, this week is jammed pack with Characters, who battle it out on the Qualifier with amusing attempts at the inconceivable Field Goal Swing. Its no easy task to earn a spot in the Wipeout Zone this week with the Dreadmill, sorting the men from the boys. Contestants must dodge the wrecking ball while shooting basketballs. Although there is one man who came prepared, Dodgeball Champion Dan Bennett, whose “Duck, Dive, Dip, Dodge and Dunk” training comes into play.

programme.title: Wipeout Canada
programme.desc: 20 ordinary Canadians will compete in the world’s largest most extreme obstacle course designed to provide the most spills, thrills and fantastic fumbles ever seen on television.

programme.title: Wipeout Australia
programme.desc: 20 Greatest Hits

programme.title: Total Wipeout UK
programme.desc: Contestants take on one of television’s largest and most extreme obstacle courses.

programme.title: Total Wipeout
programme.desc: This episode sees the return of the finalists from across the series as they compete for the ultimate title.

programme.title: Wipeout Australia
programme.desc: Showdowns don’t come more epic than this. Pro Wrestler Mikey takes on Wipeout Australias very own Tom Cruise. Its neck and neck through the qualifier which this week includes a real Mission Impossible, Dirty Balls. The trash talk is as fierce as the competition and continues to the Wipeout Zone with the winner taking not only the $20,000 but also the glory. Australia is also introduced to a new kind of “violent love”, the Fight Hug.

programme.title: Total Wipeout
programme.desc: It's all kicking off in Buenos Aires - again!

programme.title: Wipeout Canada
programme.desc: 20 ordinary Canadians will compete in the world’s largest most extreme obstacle course designed to provide the most spills, thrills and fantastic fumbles ever seen on television.

programme.title: Total Wipeout
programme.desc: This time the 'Dodgeball Men' are back to make 'The Qualifier' game an even bigger challenge for contestants.

programme.title: Wipeout Canada
programme.desc: Beams and Jets, Donut Swing, Big Balls, a Potato Sack, and Barrel Crossing are just some of the over-the-top obstacles included in this week’s episode.

programme.title: Wipeout Australia
programme.desc: Showdowns don’t come more epic than this. Pro Wrestler Mikey takes on Wipeout Australias very own Tom Cruise. Its neck and neck through the qualifier which this week includes a real Mission Impossible, Dirty Balls. The trash talk is as fierce as the competition and continues to the Wipeout Zone with the winner taking not only the $20,000 but also the glory. Australia is also introduced to a new kind of “violent love”, the Fight Hug.

programme.title: Wipeout Australia
programme.desc: From singing Pastors to Wookies, this week is jammed pack with Characters, who battle it out on the Qualifier with amusing attempts at the inconceivable Field Goal Swing. Its no easy task to earn a spot in the Wipeout Zone this week with the Dreadmill, sorting the men from the boys. Contestants must dodge the wrecking ball while shooting basketballs. Although there is one man who came prepared, Dodgeball Champion Dan Bennett, whose “Duck, Dive, Dip, Dodge and Dunk” training comes into play.

programme.title: Total Wipeout
programme.desc: Twenty foolhardy Brits attempt to conquer the purpose-built obstacle course in Argentina.

programme.title: Wipeout Canada
programme.desc: Topple towers, Cookie Cutter, The Tails, Teeter Totters and Crazy Beams are among the over-the-top obstacles on this week’s episode.

programme.title: Total Wipeout
programme.desc: Today the contestants again face the Slippery Stairs during The Qualifier round.

programme.title: Total Wipeout
programme.desc: Ordinary British folk fly halfway across the world to test their endurance and bouncability in Argentina.

programme.title: Wipeout Australia
programme.desc: Wipeout Australia debunks the myth that only young, fit and funky people should go on game shows. This week we are forced to take notice of Demolition Dave, a 49 yr old South Australia man who thanks to some home training smashes the qualifier. For those lucky enough to survive the Fly Screen Sweeper it was Dizzy Dummy time. Emerging as the Dark Horse, Kobie Mulligan earned herself a shot in the Wipeout Zone, joined by a Strategist and Rubber Woman resulting in a bitter showdown.

programme.title: Total Wipeout
programme.desc: In this episode, contestants face different games like Dizzy Dummies and The Wipeout Zone.

programme.title: Wipeout Canada
programme.desc: 20 crazy contestants will face the Donut Run, Donut swing, The Tails and Tippy Tables in this week’s episode.

programme.title: Total Wipeout
programme.desc: In this episode, the North of the country takes on the South in a battle to win the coveted trophy.

programme.title: Total Wipeout
programme.desc: Will Ali the penguin keeper slip and slide his way to success on the Qualifier?

programme.title: Wipeout Canada
programme.desc: Buoys, Field Goal Swing, Big Donuts and Tippy Tables are some of the over-the-top obstacles in this week’s episode.

programme.title: Wipeout Australia
programme.desc: Mesmerized by Bon Bon’s Belly Dancing, we catch up with our favourite Big Balls in the Qualifier. They dish out punishment to Australia’s very own female Jim Carrey and send Big Cat tamer Robbie into the pond. Goofy Goggles up the ante on the Dreadmill causing the Breakdancing Dad to create hilarious new moves. Golden Guns, Marisa battles it out for the ladies against Perfect Specimen, Seamus in the Wipeout Zone.

programme.title: Total Wipeout
programme.desc: Richard Hammond dons his tuxedo for a special program honouring the heroes of Total Wipeout's fifth series.

programme.title: Total Wipeout
programme.desc: 20 fabulous contestants travel halfway across the globe to the purpose-built course in Buenos Aires.

programme.title: Total Wipeout
programme.desc: Winter Wipeout has the awards show to end all awards shows –The Snow Globes.

programme.title: Total Wipeout
programme.desc: This is the last episode of the season and the 8 previous winners compete to be the Champion of Champions.

programme.title: Total Wipeout
programme.desc: Total Wipeout is back with this exciting last season!

programme.title: Total Wipeout
programme.desc: This week they have added two new obstacles to 'The Qualifier' game.

programme.title: Wipeout Australia
programme.desc: It’s no doubt that the ‘Ball Crusher’ Sweeper is the star of tonight’s show. With a brother- sister team hanging by a thread and a three-way hurdle, this week’s Sweeper writes itself into the History books. Tonight is also the night we meet Buffman, a pint sized Superhero with a twitch and a photo finish at the Dizzy Dummy threatens extinction to a Rare Breed. A week of action packed Wipeouts with Latin Dancing lotharios, what more can you ask for? And for the kids, a Fairy Tale, Wipeout Style!
